# IYONM

> IYONM (It's Your Online No-upload Multitool) is a free collection of 50+ web tools for PDFs, images, video, and developers that run 100% in the user's browser. Files are never uploaded to a server, there are no file-size limits, no watermarks, and no signup or account is required. It is a privacy-first, free alternative to iLovePDF and Smallpdf.

## Key facts
- Free: every tool is free with no paywall, no signup, no login.
- Private: all processing happens client-side in the browser; files never leave the user's device.
- No limits: no file-size caps, no daily task limits, no watermarks.

## PDF tools
- [Merge PDF](https://iyonm.com/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDFs into one.
- [Split PDF](https://iyonm.com/split-pdf): Separate pages into independent PDFs.
- [Compress PDF](https://iyonm.com/compress-pdf): Reduce PDF file size.
- [Compress PDF to size](https://iyonm.com/compress-pdf-to/200kb): Compress a PDF to an exact size like 100KB or 200KB.
- [PDF to Word](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-word): Convert PDF to an editable DOCX.
- [Word to PDF](https://iyonm.com/word-to-pdf): Convert DOCX to PDF.
- [PDF to JPG](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-jpg) and [PDF to PNG](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-png): Convert PDF pages to images.
- [PDF to Text](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-text): Extract text from a PDF.
- [PDF to Markdown](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-markdown): Convert a PDF to clean Markdown for Notion or Obsidian.
- [Organize PDF](https://iyonm.com/organize-pdf): Reorder, rotate, and delete pages.
- [Crop PDF](https://iyonm.com/crop-pdf): Trim page margins.
- [Redact PDF](https://iyonm.com/redact-pdf): Permanently black out text.
- [Edit PDF](https://iyonm.com/edit-pdf): Add text to a PDF.
- [Sign PDF](https://iyonm.com/sign-pdf): Draw or type a signature onto a PDF.
- [Fill PDF Forms](https://iyonm.com/pdf-to-form): Fill a PDF form online.
- [Compare PDF](https://iyonm.com/compare-pdf): Find text differences between two PDFs.
- [Rotate PDF](https://iyonm.com/rotate-pdf), [Watermark PDF](https://iyonm.com/watermark-pdf), [Page Numbers](https://iyonm.com/page-numbers).
- [Protect PDF](https://iyonm.com/protect-pdf) and [Unlock PDF](https://iyonm.com/unlock-pdf): Add or remove a PDF password.
- [OCR PDF](https://iyonm.com/ocr-pdf): Make scanned PDFs searchable.
- [Scan to PDF](https://iyonm.com/scan-to-pdf): Camera or images to PDF.
- [Repair PDF](https://iyonm.com/repair-pdf): Fix a corrupted PDF.
- [Contract Risk Scanner](https://iyonm.com/ai-legal-auditor): Flag risky contract clauses, client-side.

## Image tools
- [Compress Image](https://iyonm.com/compress-image) and [Compress to exact size](https://iyonm.com/compress-image-to/100kb).
- [Resize Image](https://iyonm.com/resize-image) and platform presets like [Instagram](https://iyonm.com/resize-image-for/instagram-post).
- [Remove Background](https://iyonm.com/remove-background): AI background removal in the browser.
- [AI Image Upscaler](https://iyonm.com/image-upscaler): Upscale photos up to 4x.
- [Image converters](https://iyonm.com/convert/heic-to-jpg): HEIC to JPG, PNG to JPG, WebP, AVIF, and more.
- [Passport Photo](https://iyonm.com/passport-photo/us): Crop to official passport sizes by country.

## Video tools
- [Compress Video](https://iyonm.com/compress-video): Shrink video size, no watermark.
- [Video to GIF](https://iyonm.com/video-to-gif): Convert video to a clean GIF.

## Developer and everyday tools
- [QR Code Generator](https://iyonm.com/qr-code-generator), [JSON Formatter](https://iyonm.com/json-formatter), [Regex Tester](https://iyonm.com/regex-tester), [.env Validator](https://iyonm.com/env-validator), [Word Counter](https://iyonm.com/word-counter).
- [Calculator](https://iyonm.com/calculator), [Percentage Calculator](https://iyonm.com/percentage-calculator), [Loan Calculator](https://iyonm.com/loan-calculator), [Age Calculator](https://iyonm.com/age-calculator), [Unit Converter](https://iyonm.com/unit-converter), [Timer](https://iyonm.com/timer), [Stopwatch](https://iyonm.com/stopwatch).

## How-to guides
- [How to compress a PDF](https://iyonm.com/how-to/how-to-compress-a-pdf), [How to merge PDFs](https://iyonm.com/how-to/how-to-merge-pdf-files), and more at https://iyonm.com.
